calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-05-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Mo By Pltfs For Judgment On The Pleadings, Calendar Motion: Judgment On Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-02-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James Brandan Kraus, Esq. 956-8100 for pltfs & moving parties; Jason M. Erlich, Esq. 956-6488 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Motion for judgment on the pleadings to 1st affirmative defense failure to state a cause of action overruled as to all causes of action except 4th cause of action negligent infliction of emotional distress, 6th cause of action fraud, 8th cause of action unfair business practice 17200. Fraud granted with leave to amend, NIED granted without leave to amend, unfair business practices granted without leave to amend. 3rd affirmative defense granted with leave to amend. 4th affirmative defense failure to mitigate granted with leave to amend. 5th affirmative defense waiver and unclean hands granted with leave to amend. 6th afffirmative defense laches denied. 7th affirmative defense breach of contract granted with leave to amend. 8th affirmative defense estoppel granted with leave to amend. 9th affirmative defense granted with leave to amend. 10th affirmative defense good faith granted with leave to amend. 11th affirmative defense privilege, justification denied. 12th & 13th affirmative defenses JOP granted with leave to amend. 14th affirmative defense compliance with B&P 17200 denied. 15th affirmative defense granted as to all causes of action except 8th B&P 17200.

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that the JOP is granted as to laches with leave to amend and as to unfair business practices granted with leave to amend. Pltf to prepare order.
Pltfs' Demurrer To Answer Of Defts Lou & Vivian Tom, Calendar Motion: Demurrer
